basic_details.job_title: NPCIL Kudankulam Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 255 Stipendiary Trainee/Technician (ST/TN) Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Nuclear Power Corporation of India Ltd. (NPCIL) – Kudankulam Nuclear Power Project (KKNPP)
basic_details.job_location: Kudankulam Nuclear Power Project, Radhapuram Taluk, Tirunelveli District, Tamil Nadu – 627106
basic_details.short_information: The Nuclear Power Corporation of India Ltd. (NPCIL), Kudankulam Nuclear Power Project (KKNPP), has released Advertisement No. NPCIL/KKNPP/HRM/01/2026 inviting online applications from eligible Indian citizens for 255 Category-II Stipendiary Trainee/Technician (ST/TN) posts. Online applications open on 15 July 2026 and close on 4 August 2026. Selected candidates will undergo a 2-year training programme and, on successful completion, will be absorbed as Technician-B in Level-3 of the pay matrix.

age_limit.details: The age limit for ST/TN posts is 18 to 24 years. The specific reference date for age calculation is Not Available in the notification. | PwBD relaxation is cumulative if the candidate also belongs to OBC(NCL) or SC/ST.

qualification.details: Eligibility differs by post/discipline as follows: | For both the above posts, candidates must have studied English as one of the subjects at least at the SSC (10th) level. | NPCIL has specified separate, relaxed eligibility criteria for Project Affected Persons (PAP) whose land has been acquired for the Kudankulam Nuclear Power Project: | Plant Operator (PAP): Pass in HSC (12th Std) with not less than 40% marks in aggregate in Science stream (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics), with English as one of the subjects at least at SSC level. Electronics Mechanic / Instrument Mechanic / Electrician / Fitter / Turner / Machinist / Welder (PAP): Pass in SSC with Science and Mathematics and English as subjects at SSC level, with a 2-year ITI certificate. Where the ITI course duration is less than 2 years, 1 year of relevant experience after course completion is required. PAP candidates whose land was acquired for KKNPP receive 20% of the total marks as bonus marks at all stages of selection to Group "C" posts.

salary_details.details: Apply Online: Click here Official Notification PDF: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

how_to_apply: Visit the official NPCIL careers website: npcilcareers.co.in or npcil.nic.in
Locate the notification for KKNPP Recruitment 2026 (Advt No. NPCIL/KKNPP/HRM/01/2026)
Read the detailed advertisement carefully for discipline-wise eligibility and vacancy break-up
Register and complete the online application form
Applications can be submitted from 15 July 2026 (10:00 AM) to 4 August 2026 (4:00 PM)
important_instructions: Candidates must be Indian citizens. Only online applications will be accepted; the notification does not mention any offline application mode. Any further information, corrigendum, or addendum relating to this recruitment will be uploaded only on the official NPCIL websites. NPCIL states it strives to have a workforce that reflects gender balance and encourages women applicants.

rows.details: Nuclear Power Corporation of India Ltd. (NPCIL) – Kudankulam Nuclear Power Project (KKNPP)
Kudankulam Nuclear Power Project, Radhapuram Taluk, Tirunelveli District, Tamil Nadu – 627106

content_sections.heading: NPCIL Stipendiary Trainee/Technician Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: NPCIL KKNPP has announced a total of 255 vacancies for Category-II ST/TN posts. The category-wise distribution is given below.

content_sections.heading: NPCIL KKNPP Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Eligibility differs by post/discipline as follows: For both the above posts, candidates must have studied English as one of the subjects at least at the SSC (10th) level. NPCIL has specified separate, relaxed eligibility criteria for Project Affected Persons (PAP) whose land has been acquired for the Kudankulam Nuclear Power Project: Plant Operator (PAP): Pass in HSC (12th Std) with not less than 40% marks in aggregate in Science stream (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics), with English as one of the subjects at least at SSC level. Electronics Mechanic / Instrument Mechanic / Electrician / Fitter / Turner / Machinist / Welder (PAP): Pass in SSC with Science and Mathematics and English as subjects at SSC level, with a 2-year ITI certificate. Where the ITI course duration is less than 2 years, 1 year of relevant experience after course completion is required. PAP candidates whose land was acquired for KKNPP receive 20% of the total marks as bonus marks at all stages of selection to Group "C" posts.

rows.educational_qualification: HSC (10+2) or ISC with Science stream (Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics subjects) with minimum 50% marks in aggregate

rows.post_discipline: Stipendiary Trainee/Technician (Electronics Mechanic / Instrument Mechanic / Electrician / Fitter / Turner / Machinist / Welder)
rows.educational_qualification: SSC (10th) with minimum 50% marks in Science subject(s) and Mathematics individually, plus a 2-year ITI certificate in the relevant trade. Where the ITI course duration is less than 2 years, the candidate must have at least 1 year of relevant work experience after completing the course.

content_sections.heading: NPCIL KKNPP Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The age limit for ST/TN posts is 18 to 24 years. The specific reference date for age calculation is Not Available in the notification. PwBD relaxation is cumulative if the candidate also belongs to OBC(NCL) or SC/ST.

content_sections.heading: NPCIL Stipendiary Trainee/Technician Salary and Stipend 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will undergo a 2-year training programme with the following stipend structure: First year: Rs. 20,000 per month Second year: Rs. 22,000 per month One-time book allowance: Rs. 3,000 (no other allowance is admissible during training) On successful completion of training, trainees will be absorbed for appointment as Technician-B in Level-3 of the pay matrix, with Basic Pay of Rs. 21,700 plus other applicable pay and allowances.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates must be Indian citizens. Only online applications will be accepted; the notification does not mention any offline application mode. Any further information, corrigendum, or addendum relating to this recruitment will be uploaded only on the official NPCIL websites. NPCIL states it strives to have a workforce that reflects gender balance and encourages women applicants.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NPCIL KKNPP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 4 August 2026 at 4:00 PM. Applications opened on 15 July 2026 at 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in NPCIL KKNPP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NPCIL has announced 255 vacancies for Category-II Stipendiary Trainee/Technician (ST/TN) posts, including 11 vacancies reserved for PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for NPCIL Stipendiary Trainee/Technician posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is 18 to 24 years, with age relaxation of 3 years for OBC(NCL), 5 years for SC/ST, and 10 years for PwBD candidates (cumulative where applicable).

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend for NPCIL Stipendiary Trainee/Technician during training?
faq.answer: Trainees receive Rs. 20,000 per month in the first year and Rs. 22,000 per month in the second year, along with a one-time book allowance of Rs. 3,000.

faq.question: Q5. What educational qualification is required for the NPCIL ST/TN Plant Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates need HSC (10+2) or ISC with Science stream (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics) and a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate.

faq.question: Q6. Is ITI required for NPCIL Electronics Mechanic, Electrician, or Fitter posts?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates need SSC (10th) with minimum 50% marks in Science and Mathematics individually, plus a 2-year ITI certificate in the relevant trade. If the ITI course is shorter than 2 years, 1 year of relevant work experience is required.

faq.question: Q7. How do I apply online for NPCIL KKNPP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through npcilcareers.co.in or npcil.nic.in between 15 July 2026 and 4 August 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What happens after successful completion of NPCIL Stipendiary Trainee training?
faq.answer: On successful completion of the 2-year training, trainees are absorbed as Technician-B in Level-3 of the pay matrix with Basic Pay of Rs. 21,700 plus other applicable pay and allowances.
